channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Meliora Meadows Adjustments
item.description: Adjusts A LOT of mods, applying Aldi's Classes trait restrictions and disabling some jsons.

item.title: Floral Zones: Cape Region
item.description: Adds plants from the Cape Region to the game.

item.title: HoR xSkills Compat
item.description: HoR patch for XSkills.

item.title: HoR xSkills Addon
item.description: 195+ abilities across 17 skills extending XSkills with Navigation, Building, Alchemy, and more.

item.title: HoR Patches
item.description: Balance fixes, xSkills integration, FotSA animal tuning, ore rebalancing and much more.

item.title: Animalica Core
item.description: Core mod for playable animals. Does nothing on it's own

item.title: Animalica - Foxes, Wolves & Hyenas
item.description: Adds Foxes, Wolves, and Hyenas as player choices!

item.title: Rust Girls - Player Model
item.description: BE the waifu!

item.title: rawNature
item.description: Adds materials, recipes, items, and a new balance of things to the game

item.title: RPG Overlay
item.description: Add levels and health tier for entity info

item.title: In Dappled Groves Firewood Buff Continued
item.description: Adjusts some of In Dappled Groves' recipes

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Server Essentials
item.description: Utility commands and functions

item.title: Rustique: Vintage Story Mod Manager - Linux
item.description: A fast AF mod manager & updater that handles dependencies and has modpack support!

item.title: Dense Ground Storage
item.description: Place down more items per block and on chiseled blocks

item.title: Rustique: Vintage Story Mod Manager - Windows
item.description: A fast AF mod manager & updater that handles dependencies and has modpack support!

item.title: Pyrogenesis continued
item.description: Adaptation

item.title: fish(wastaken) Classes Patch
item.description: small personal patch for GlooMeClasses.

item.title: Immersive Inventory Slots
item.description: Removes inventory slots, leaving only the crafting grid

item.title: Server Authentication
item.description: Increase the security for your server by adding a new account register and login

item.title: Planar
item.description: Turn one server into many worlds. Real generated terrain, walk forever, travel by World Gate.

item.title: Spawners API
item.description: Add custom spawners

item.title: Clothes Have Pockets
item.description: Adds pockets (inventory slots) to various clothing items

item.title: SkyTp
item.description: Teleport Gui for Skyblock server

item.title: Worm Castings Expanded
item.description: A very niche addition to Primitive Survival.

item.title: RPG Difficulty
item.description: Increases creatures stats as you move further away from spawn or going deeper in the caves

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Rust Girls
item.description: Monster girls, in MY Vintage Story? Sure, why not.

item.title: Level UP
item.description: Add new levels systems to your character
